cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 31% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.00% · BTC +2.38% · Gold +1.62% · Nasdaq100 -1.61%. 31% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.44%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.44%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -6.29%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -12.48%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +10.99%, ISRG +5.87%, AAPL +4.66%, ADBE +4.11%, ADBE +4.11%. Laggards: TER -12.48%, CEVA -11.59%, KLAC -10.66%, AMBA -9.85%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.83% at $162.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.83% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
